'''Elsen Barthis''' was a member of [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service|Galactic Alliance Intelligence]] who, along with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Titch]], tried to convince [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to give information to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] on [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] just prior to the start of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

Barthis was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] from a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] family in her mid twenties. [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] worked with her father for a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], presumably in [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]]. She was blonde, well-muscled, as tall as Wedge Antilles, and in her mid-twenties as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

It turns out that it was a trap, and Barthis was simply trying to get Wedge away from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the GA's attack on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Wedge managed to escape, and shot her with Titch's blaster. Due to the failure of the mission to keep Wedge in custody, she was demoted from her previous rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]].

Later, Barthis was present at [[Toryaz Station]] during the meeting between Corellian and GA delegates. She danced with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
